sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54954" key="katapuknwte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταπυκν-ωτέον</orth>, <sense id="n54954.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must fill up</tr_>, of intervals in music, Theo Sm.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg002:p.91" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.91</biblScope> </bibl> H.; cf. <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">καταπυκνόω</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg002:11:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
